section: Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction
subsection: Translating the Response in $ A_{v} $ Into Response in $ \sigma_{E}^{2} $
nearby_text: te the change in the mean breeding value (for the environmental variance) of the selected parents from the mean breeding value of the entire population. The resulting change in $ \sigma_E^2 $ becomes $$ \begin{aligned}\Delta\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)&=\sigma_{E}^{2}(t+1)-\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\&=\left[\mu_{A_{v}}(t+1)+\sigma_{e}^{2}\right]-\left[\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+\sigma_{e}^{2}\right]\\&=\left[\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}(t)\right]-\mu_{A_{v}}(t)=R_{A_{v}}(t)\\ \end{aligned} $$ (17.6a)

  "nearby_text": "te the change in the mean breeding value (for the environmental variance) of the selected parents from the mean breeding value of the entire population. The resulting change in $ \\sigma_E^2 $ becomes $$ \\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)&=\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t+1)-\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\\\&=\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t+1)+\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\right]-\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\right]\\\\&=\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}(t)\\right]-\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)=R_{A_{v}}(t)\\\\ \\end{aligned} $$ (17.6a)"
}

nearby_text: \mu_{A_v}(t+1) = \mu_{A_v}(t) + R_{A_v}(t) $, if we assume that there is no change in the additive variance of environmental sensitivities following selection ( $ \Delta\sigma^2(A_v) = 0 $), we have $$ \begin{aligned}\Delta\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)&=\sigma_{E}^{2}(t+1)-\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\&=\left(\left[\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}(t)\right]^{2}+\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}\right)\sigma_{e}^{2}-\left[\mu_{A_{v}}^{2}(t)+\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}\right]\sigma_{e}^{2}\\&=\left[2\mu_{A_{v}}(t)R_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}^{2}(t)\right]\sigma_{e}^{2}\\ \end{aligned} $$ (17.6b)

This is a weak selection model, as $ W \\geq 0 $ only for sufficiently small $ s $ relative to the total"

section: Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction
subsection: Response From Stabilizing Selection on Phenotypic Value, z
nearby_text: lace $ z $ by $ A_m + A_v $ and take the expectation over $ e $. Noting that $ \mathrm{E}[e] = 0 $, $ \mathrm{E}[e^2] = \sigma_e^2 $, the expected fitness as a function of $ A_m $ and $ A_v $ becomes $$ \begin{aligned}W(A_{m},A_{v})&=1-s\operatorname{E}\left[\left(A_{m}+A_{v}e-\theta\right)^{2}\mid A_{m},A_{v}\right]\\&=1-s\left[\left(A_{m}-\theta\right)^{2}+2(A_{m}-\theta)A_{v}\operatorname{E}\left[e\right]+A_{v}^{2}\operatorname{E}\left(e^{2}\right)\right]\\&=1-s\left[\left(A_{m}-\theta\right)^{2}+A_{v}^{2}\sigma_{e}^{2}\right]\\ \end{aligned} $$ (17.7b)

      {

      {

        "latex": "E=U\\cdot\\sqrt{\\sigma_{e}^{2}+A_{v}}\\quad\\mathrm{w h e r e}\\quad U\\sim N(0,1)\\quad\\mathrm{a n d}\\quad A_{v}\\sim N(\\mu_{A_{v}},\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2})",

      {
        "id": "formula_17.4b",
        "latex": "\\sigma^{2}(E\\mid A_{v})=\\sigma_{e}^{2}+A_{v}",

        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",

        "symbols_defined": [

        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.4c",
        "latex": "\\sigma_{E}^{2}=\\mathrm{E}\\left(\\sigma_{e}^{2}+A_{v}\\right)=\\sigma_{e}^{2}+\\mu_{A_{v}}",
        "label": "Formula 17.4c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "The Additive Model",
        "position": 13,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "E",
          "\\sigma"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.5a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\sigma(A_{v},z^{2})&=\\sigma(A_{v},[\\mu+A_{m}+E]^{2})=\\sigma(A_{v},E^{2})\\\\&=\\sigma(A_{v},U^{2}[A_{v}+\\sigma_{e}^{2}])=\\sigma(A_{v},A_{v})=\\sigma^{2}(A_{v})\\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 17.5a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "The Heritability of the Environmental Variance, $ h_{v}^{2} $",

          "v",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.5b",
        "latex": "h_{v}^{2}=\\frac{\\sigma(A_{v},z^{2})}{\\sigma^{2}(z^{2})}",
        "label": "Formula 17.5b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "The Heritability of the Environmental Variance, $ h_{v}^{2} $",
        "position": 15,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "h",
          "v"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.5c",
        "latex": "h_{v}^{2}=\\frac{\\sigma^{2}(A_{v})}{2\\sigma_{z}^{4}+3\\sigma^{2}(A_{v})}",
        "label": "Formula 17.5c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "The Heritability of the Environmental Variance, $ h_{v}^{2} $",
        "position": 16,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "h",
          "v"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.6a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)&=\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t+1)-\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\\\&=\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t+1)+\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\right]-\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\right]\\\\&=\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}(t)\\right]-\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)=R_{A_{v}}(t)\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 17.6a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Translating the Response in $ A_{v} $ Into Response in $ \\sigma_{E}^{2} $",
        "position": 20,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "E",
          "\\Delta",
          "\\sigma",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.6b",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)&=\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t+1)-\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\\\&=\\left(\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}(t)\\right]^{2}+\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}\\right)\\sigma_{e}^{2}-\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}^{2}(t)+\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}\\right]\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\\\&=\\left[2\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)R_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}^{2}(t)\\right]\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 17.6b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Translating the Response in $ A_{v} $ Into Response in $ \\sigma_{E}^{2} $",
        "position": 21,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "E",
          "\\Delta",
          "\\sigma",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.6c",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)&=\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t+1)-\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\\\&=\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\exp\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}(t)+\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}/2\\right]-\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\exp\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}/2\\right]\\\\&=\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\exp\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}/2\\right]\\left[\\exp\\left(R_{A_{v}}\\{t\\}\\right)-1\\right]\\\\&=\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\cdot\\left[\\exp(R_{A_{v}}\\{t\\})-1\\right]\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 17.6c",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Translating the Response in $ A_{v} $ Into Response in $ \\sigma_{E}^{2} $",
        "position": 22,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "E",
          "\\Delta",
          "\\sigma",
          "t"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.7a",
        "latex": "W(z)=1-s(z-\\theta)^{2}",
        "label": "Formula 17.7a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Response From Stabilizing Selection on Phenotypic Value, z",
        "position": 24,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "W",
          "z"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.7b",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}W(A_{m},A_{v})&=1-s\\operatorname{E}\\left[\\left(A_{m}+A_{v}e-\\theta\\right)^{2}\\mid A_{m},A_{v}\\right]\\\\&=1-s\\left[\\left(A_{m}-\\theta\\right)^{2}+2(A_{m}-\\theta)A_{v}\\operatorname{E}\\left[e\\right]+A_{v}^{2}\\operatorname{E}\\left(e^{2}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=1-s\\left[\\left(A_{m}-\\theta\\right)^{2}+A_{v}^{2}\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\right]\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 17.7b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Response From Stabilizing Selection on Phenotypic Value, z",
        "position": 25,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "A",
          "W",
          "m",
          "v"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.8a",
        "latex": "W(A_{m},A_{v})=\\sqrt{\\frac{\\omega^{2}}{\\omega^{2}+\\sigma_{e}^{2}+A_{v}}}\\exp\\left[-\\frac{(A_{m}-\\theta)^{2}}{2(\\omega^{2}+\\sigma_{e}^{2}+A_{v})}\\right]",
        "label": "Formula 17.8a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Response From Stabilizing Selection on Phenotypic Value, z",
        "position": 26,
        "symbols_defined": [

          "W",
          "m",
          "v"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "formula_17.8b",
        "latex": "W(A_{m},A_{v})\\simeq1-\\frac{\\sigma_{e}^{2}+A_{v}}{2\\omega^{2}}",
        "label": "Formula 17.8b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Response From Stabilizing Selection on Phenotypic Value, z",
        "position": 27,
        "symbols_defined": [
          "W"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "nearby_text": "Now consider directional selection on the trait phenotype, z. We first assume that the multiplicative model holds and that we have a simple linear fitness function $$ W(z)=1+sz $$ (17.9a)"

label: Formula 17.9b
section: Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction

        "id": "formula_17.6a",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)&=\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t+1)-\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\\\&=\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t+1)+\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\right]-\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\right]\\\\&=\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}(t)\\right]-\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)=R_{A_{v}}(t)\\\\ \\end{aligned}",

      {
        "id": "formula_17.6b",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)&=\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t+1)-\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\\\&=\\left(\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}(t)\\right]^{2}+\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}\\right)\\sigma_{e}^{2}-\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}^{2}(t)+\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}\\right]\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\\\&=\\left[2\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)R_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}^{2}(t)\\right]\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\\\ \\end{aligned}",

        "id": "formula_17.6c",
        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}\\Delta\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)&=\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t+1)-\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\\\&=\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\exp\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+R_{A_{v}}(t)+\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}/2\\right]-\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\exp\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}/2\\right]\\\\&=\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\exp\\left[\\mu_{A_{v}}(t)+\\sigma_{A_{v}}^{2}/2\\right]\\left[\\exp\\left(R_{A_{v}}\\{t\\}\\right)-1\\right]\\\\&=\\sigma_{E}^{2}(t)\\cdot\\left[\\exp(R_{A_{v}}\\{t\\})-1\\right]\\\\ \\end{aligned}",

        "latex": "W(z)=1-s(z-\\theta)^{2}",

        "latex": "\\begin{aligned}W(A_{m},A_{v})&=1-s\\operatorname{E}\\left[\\left(A_{m}+A_{v}e-\\theta\\right)^{2}\\mid A_{m},A_{v}\\right]\\\\&=1-s\\left[\\left(A_{m}-\\theta\\right)^{2}+2(A_{m}-\\theta)A_{v}\\operatorname{E}\\left[e\\right]+A_{v}^{2}\\operatorname{E}\\left(e^{2}\\right)\\right]\\\\&=1-s\\left[\\left(A_{m}-\\theta\\right)^{2}+A_{v}^{2}\\sigma_{e}^{2}\\right]\\\\ \\end{aligned}",
        "label": "Formula 17.7b",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",
        "subsection": "Response From Stabilizing Selection on Phenotypic Value, z",

        "label": "Formula 17.8a",
        "section": "Short-term Changes in the Variance: 2. Changes in the Environmental Variance: Introduction",

  "nearby_text": "Taking the expectation over environmental values, Gavrilets and Hastings (1994c) found that $$ W(A_{m},A_{v})=1-s\\mathrm{E}(A_{m}+eA_{v}\\mid A_{m},A_{v})=1-sA_{m}+A_{v}\\mathrm{E}(e)=1-sA_{m} $$ (17.9b)"
